title: The App Market
drDigitalIntro:
Your computer has a built-in app market where you download new apps safely.
• On some computers it's called App Store, on others Play Store or Microsoft Store — they all work the same way.
• Every app is reviewed before it's listed.
• Browse by category, search by name, or read reviews from other users.

steps.say: You're in the App Market. Click 'Games' to browse games.
Click on Puzzle Quest to see its details, reviews, and screenshots.
Nice! Now go back to the App Market tab.

drDigitalSuccess: You browsed the App Market! Each app page shows ratings, reviews, and screenshots so you can decide before installing.
drDigitalHint: Click a category to browse, then click an app name to see its full listing.
